summary: Complete frontend testing of /contact page redesign with Precision Craft design system. All 9 sections verified with 100% pass rate. All features, links, SEO tags, and responsive design working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contact page (/contact) fully verified with Precision Craft design system. All 9 sections working: (1) Hero with breadcrumb 'Home -> Contact Us', eyebrow 'GET IN TOUCH — BAY AREA', H1 'Contact FixitBay', subtitle, Call and Book buttons, 4 social icons (Google, Facebook, Thumbtack, Nextdoor). (2) Quick Contact Bar with orange #FF5722 background, 3 items (CALL US with phone, EMAIL US with email, HOURS). (3) Main Contact Section with 2-column layout: 4 info cards (Phone, Email, Address, Hours) and right column (Service Area list + FIND US ONLINE social icons). (4) Steps section with 4 numbered steps (1-4) with titles and descriptions, dashed connector line on desktop. (5) Text Us section with SMS button. (6) Final CTA with 'Schedule Your Repair Today' heading, hours block, Book Online and Call buttons. (7) Minimal Footer with logo, phone in #FF5722, copyright 2026. (8) Floating BOOK REPAIR button on desktop after 300px scroll. (9) Mobile sticky bar (CALL, BOOK ONLINE, TEXT US) on mobile viewport. SEO: title contains 'Contact FixitBay', meta description present, canonical https://fixitbay.net/contact, JSON-LD LocalBusiness and BreadcrumbList schemas. Design: navy #0D1B2A, cream #F8F5F0, accent #FF5722, Montserrat font. Uses custom SEOMetaTags component + useSchemas hook (NOT react-helmet-async). Social icons imported as SVG files.
